      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un fadedsinaja ta KUNGA
Nammu/ un ta Kehnina Nam-
mu/ un wiſſus Jerusalemes
Nammus/ ir wiſſus leelns Nam-
mus fadedsinaja wiſsch ar Ug-
guni.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſſ Kaldeêru
Spehks/ kas pee to Pils Karra-
Wihrn Wirfneeku bija/ nolaust-
ja tohs Jerusalemes Muheus
apfahrt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tohs atlizziſschus Lau-
dis/ kas Pilssfahta bija atlizzi-
nati/ un tohs Atkahpajus/ kas
pee to Babeles Kehninu pahr-
gahjuschı/ un to zittu Draudſ-
bu aisweddę NebusarAdans tas
Pils Karra-Wihrn Wirfneeks.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet no teem Semmes
Laudim atlizzinaja tae Pils-
Karra-Wihrn Wirfneeks zittus
par Wihrn-Dahrsneekem un
Arravecal.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee Kaldeêri falausti-
ja tohs Warra Stabbus/ kas ta-
KUNGA Namma bija/ un tohs
Skrahgus/ un to Warra Juh-
ru/ kas ta KUNGA Namma
bija/ un nowedde to Warra us
Babeli.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tee nehme arridsan tohs
Pohdus un Lahpstas/ un Dak-
fhas/ un Rwehpja-Trankus/ un
wiſſus Warra Rihkus/ ar ko tas
Darbs tappe padarrhts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Pils Karra-Wihrn
Wirfneeks noeheine tahs Pan-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tobs diwi Stabbus/
weenu Juhru/ un tohs Skra-
gus/ ko Salamans preekſch
KUNGA Namma bij darr
Wiſſu scho Tranku Warth
bijs fiwerxams.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Weens Stabsbija ast
padefmits Obteſſon augsts/
winną Pohga us to bija no Wi-
ra/ un ta Pohga bija trihs
lektıs augsta/ an tahs Stib-
un Granat- Ahboti apkahrt
Pohgu bija viſſi no Warra.
ta patt bija erri tas ohtrs Sta-
ar tahın Schpahm-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Pils Karra-Wi
Wirfneekı nehme Seruju tı
pirmas lahrtas Preesteri/
Zetvanije tahs ohtras Rah-
Preesteri/ un trihs Sleeg-
Sargus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un no Pilssfahta neh-
winsch weennu Kambar-Junk-
kas pahr teent Karra-Wihr-
bija eezelts/ un peezus Wihr-
no teem/ kas allachin preekſc
Kehninu bija/ un Pilssfahta
rasti tappe/ nn Soweru to K-
ra Peel-Kungu/ kas tohs Se-
mes Laudıs us Katru ribkoja/
feschdefuunts Wihrus no te-
Semmes Laudım/ kas Pilss-
ta atrasti tappe.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un NebusarAdans
Pils Karra-Wihrn Wirfn-
tohs nehmis/noiwedde tohs ye-
Babeles Kehninu us Riblatu-
"
    }
